findings.issue: MIRT upgrade not implemented — still using 8 independent 3PL models
findings.recommended_fix: Rewrite assessment engine to use multidimensional IRT with competency loadings. Create new model file: `models/mirt_model.py`. Update engine to unify scoring logic and generate composite AURA score with dimension weights.

whistleblower_flag: Migrating to MIRT is critical for score validity. Delaying risks user distrust in AURA score integrity.
